response.justification: Wei has extensive experience as a senior and staff-level software engineer with strong capabilities in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure. However, the candidate falls significantly short of the core requirement for 8+ years of experience specifically building and shipping production-grade AI solutions. While there is a brief, recent mention of AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, the resume lacks evidence of required expertise in Python, vector databases, and RAG architectures.
strengths: Extensive senior and staff-level software engineering experience with a focus on software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD).
Strong proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure deployments (AWS CDK).
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, developer tooling, and Model Context Protocol (MCP).
concerns: Fails to meet the strict requirement of 8+ years developing AI-driven solutions.
Lacks proficiency in Python, vector databases, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures.
Limited evidence of customer-facing technical discovery and enterprise consulting experience.
